title: senecio erucifolius var. tenuifolius
intro: Senecio erucifolius var. tenuifolius, also known as the Tuberous Ragwort, is a variety of the Senecio erucifolius plant, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the southwestern regions of Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecio erucifolius var. tenuifolius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although caution should be exercised due to potential toxicity and the need for proper identification and preparation.
